prompt: Create a single Docker Python lab for a new page docs/intermediate/23-strings-docker.md that shows string methods. The starter code should demonstrate upper(), lower(), split(), and join(). Include experiment suggestions.

assertions.description: File contains exactly one docker lab using suffix '1'
Starter code includes upper(), lower(), split(), and join() calls
Page includes experiment suggestions after the lab
Starter code does not use input() — Docker runner has no stdin
Python code inside the textarea starts at column 0, not indented under the HTML tags
